channel.title: Home on LuxeHome Real Estate
channel.description: Recent content in Home on LuxeHome Real Estate

item.description:
“About Us” “Trusted Luxembourg real estate experts since 2008” “about”

officer_name: “Nathalie”

officer_bio: “Leading LuxeHome’s vision and strategy, ensuring every client receives the highest standard of service across Luxembourg’s property market.” secretary_name: “Mara”

secretary_bio: “Managing client appointments, correspondence, and day-to-day operations to keep LuxeHome running smoothly for every client.”

Who We Are

LuxeHome Real Estate is a Luxembourg-based property agency specialising in residential sales and rentals across the Grand Duchy. Founded in 2008, we have built a reputation for honest advice, deep local knowledge, and genuine care for our clients.

item.title: City Apartment
item.description:
A stylish and well-lit two-bedroom apartment located in Kirchberg, one of Luxembourg’s most sought-after neighbourhoods. Ideal for professionals working at the European institutions or the financial district.

Features

  • Open-plan living and dining area
  • Fully fitted modern kitchen with island
  • Two spacious double bedrooms with built-in wardrobes
  • Bathroom with walk-in shower and bathtub
  • Private balcony with city views
  • Underground parking space included
  • Secure building with intercom

Location

Kirchberg is home to the European Court of Justice, the European Investment Bank, and the Philharmonie Luxembourg. Excellent tram and bus connections put the city centre just 10 minutes away.

item.title: Compact Studio
item.description:
A no-nonsense compact studio that covers all the essentials at one of the most affordable price points in Luxembourg City. Warm lighting, efficient layout, and a cosy atmosphere make this a genuinely pleasant place to come home to.

Features

  • Single bed with storage
  • Kitchenette with hob and mini fridge
  • Shower room with heated towel rail
  • Natural light from street-facing window
  • Built-in shelving and hanging space
  • Utilities included in rent

Ideal For

Students, interns, or anyone starting out in Luxembourg who needs a private, affordable space of their own.

item.title: Contemporary Townhouse
item.description:
A striking contemporary townhouse in Hollerich, one of Luxembourg City’s most exciting up-and-coming neighbourhoods. Completed in 2022 with premium materials and meticulous attention to detail.

Features

  • Three floors of bright, open living space
  • Architect-designed interior with bespoke joinery
  • Integrated Bosch appliances and Corian worktops
  • Private rooftop terrace with city views
  • Smart home system — lighting, heating, security via app
  • Secure private garage
  • Energy class A — low running costs

Location

Hollerich is Luxembourg City’s fastest growing quarter, with new restaurants, galleries, and the upcoming Ban de Gasperich tram extension. Walking distance to the Gare centrale and 10 minutes from the financial district.

item.title: Cosy Small Studio
item.description:
A charming and cosy small studio with real personality — warm lamp lighting, hardwood floors, a comfortable sofa, and a large bay window that fills the space with natural light. Everything you need in a compact, liveable space.

What’s Inside

  • Double bed with quality mattress
  • Comfortable sofa and coffee table
  • Large bay window with city view
  • TV and media unit included
  • Compact kitchenette with essentials
  • Bathroom with shower
  • Plenty of shelving and storage

Ideal For

A single person, student, or young professional looking for an affordable, fully furnished base in the second city of Luxembourg.

item.title: Cosy Studio
item.description:
A bright, well-presented studio in one of Luxembourg’s most popular residential neighbourhoods. Perfect for those seeking an affordable entry point into the Luxembourg rental market.

Features

  • Modern open-plan layout
  • Fitted kitchen with dishwasher
  • Shower room with underfloor heating
  • Built-in storage solutions
  • Broadband internet included in rent
  • Close to tram and bus stops

Location

Bonnevoie is a multicultural, lively district with a great selection of independent cafés, supermarkets, and parks. The tram line provides direct access to the city centre in under 10 minutes.

item.title: Country Estate
item.description:
A rare and stunning stone manor house set among the rolling vineyards of the Moselle valley. Meticulously restored, blending original character with modern comfort.

Features

  • Six bedrooms across two floors
  • Four bathrooms with premium fittings
  • Grand reception hall and formal salon
  • Country kitchen with Aga-style range
  • Wine cellar and tasting room
  • Covered terrace overlooking the vineyard
  • 1,500m² private grounds with orchard
  • Separate guest cottage

Location

Remich is the jewel of Luxembourg’s Moselle wine region, known for its riverside promenade, wine festivals, and the Casino 2000. Just 25 minutes from Luxembourg City by car.

item.title: Countryside Cottage
item.description:
Step back in time in this beautifully preserved stone cottage in Echternach. Original features — stone walls, oak beams, terracotta floors — give the property a warmth and authenticity that modern builds simply cannot replicate.

Features

  • Three bedrooms with original oak beams
  • Renovated bathroom with freestanding bath
  • Country kitchen with stone hearth
  • Front and rear flower gardens
  • Private courtyard with stone well feature
  • Wood-burning stove in the living room
  • Cellar for wine storage
  • Off-street parking for two cars

Location

Echternach is Luxembourg’s oldest town and sits beside the picturesque Sure river on the German border. Known for its Benedictine Abbey, the European Music Festival, and gateway to the Little Switzerland hiking trails.

item.title: Detached Family House
item.description:
A stunning detached family home with genuine kerb appeal — a spacious covered porch, double garage, and manicured garden make an unforgettable first impression. Inside, generous room sizes and high ceilings create a truly comfortable family environment.

Ground Floor

  • Welcoming entrance hall with solid oak staircase
  • Open-plan kitchen and family room with island
  • Formal living room with bay window
  • Separate dining room
  • Guest WC and utility room
  • Double garage with internal access

Upper Floor

  • Master bedroom with dressing room and en-suite
  • Three further double bedrooms
  • Family bathroom and separate shower room

Outside

  • Covered front porch — perfect for year-round outdoor seating
  • Landscaped front garden with lawn
  • Rear terrace and private garden — 500m² plot

Location

Bertrange is one of Luxembourg’s most popular family communes, offering excellent schools, shopping at the Bertrange retail park, and fast access to both the city and the motorway network.

item.title: Executive City Apartment
item.description:
A flagship rental apartment for the discerning professional. Located on the upper floors of one of Kirchberg’s most prestigious residential towers, this apartment delivers hotel-standard luxury in an unbeatable location.

Features

  • Three bedrooms, master with walk-in dressing room and en-suite
  • Marble and brass kitchen with Gaggenau appliances
  • Open-plan living room with 270° panoramic city views
  • Underfloor heating throughout
  • Two bathrooms with rainfall showers
  • Two private underground parking spaces
  • 24-hour concierge and building management
  • Gym and residents’ lounge access

Location

The Kirchberg plateau is Luxembourg’s international district — home to the EU Court of Justice, the Philharmonie, MUDAM, and major financial institutions. Direct tram links to the city centre.

item.title: Family House
item.description:
A generous detached family home in one of Luxembourg’s most desirable suburban communes. Fully renovated with modern fixtures while retaining its warm, welcoming character.

Features

  • Four bedrooms including master suite with en-suite bathroom
  • Large open-plan kitchen and family room
  • Separate formal dining room
  • Private rear garden with terrace and garden shed
  • Double garage plus additional driveway parking
  • Cellar and attic storage
  • Air conditioning throughout

Location

Strassen offers excellent schools, supermarkets, and green spaces, while being just a 10-minute drive from Luxembourg City centre. Well served by bus routes and with easy motorway access.

item.title: Furnished Single Room
item.description:
A comfortable, fully furnished private room in a well-maintained apartment shared with two other working professionals. An excellent option for someone new to Luxembourg or looking to keep costs low without sacrificing quality or location.

The Room Includes

  • Single bed with quality mattress and linen provided
  • Built-in wardrobe with ample storage
  • Study desk and ergonomic chair
  • Window overlooking a quiet interior courtyard
  • Blackout curtains

Shared Facilities

  • Fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher
  • Bright shared living room
  • Bathroom shared with one other person
  • Washing machine and dryer access
  • Private letterbox

Bills Included

Rent covers electricity, heating, water, and high-speed fibre internet. No surprises at the end of the month.

item.title: Furnished Studio Flat
item.description:
A well-presented furnished studio flat available immediately. Everything is already in place — just bring your suitcase. The space is smartly arranged to give you a proper living area, a comfortable sleeping zone, and a private balcony.

What’s Included

  • Double bed with quality mattress and bedding
  • Large corner sofa and coffee table
  • Smart TV and media unit
  • Full chest of drawers and wall-mounted mirror
  • Compact dining table with bar stools
  • Kitchenette with hob, microwave, and full-size fridge
  • Bathroom with shower
  • Private balcony

Bills

Electricity, heating, and water are included in the monthly rent. High-speed internet at additional cost.

item.title: Garden Apartment
item.description:
A truly rare rental — a spacious ground-floor apartment with direct access to a private, fully enclosed garden. Light-filled interiors open seamlessly onto the outdoor space, perfect for those seeking a house feel with apartment convenience.

Features

  • Bright open-plan living and dining room
  • Large patio doors opening onto 80m² private garden
  • Two double bedrooms, both garden-facing
  • Modern bathroom with walk-in shower
  • Separate WC
  • Private garden shed and outdoor furniture included
  • Cellar storage and bicycle room

Location

Merl is one of Luxembourg City’s most desirable residential areas, bordered by the Merl Park and quiet tree-lined streets. Close to international schools, the Cloche d’Or shopping centre, and excellent public transport.

item.title: Grand Neoclassical Mansion
item.description:
Rarely does a property of this magnitude come to market. This extraordinary neoclassical mansion — with its signature white columned portico, sweeping dual staircase, and lantern entrance — represents the very pinnacle of Luxembourg residential real estate.

The Exterior

  • Grand colonnaded portico with four Ionic columns
  • Sweeping symmetrical stone staircase with balustrade
  • Double-height arched entrance with original lantern
  • Circular attic windows and dormer features
  • Manicured grounds — 4,000m² walled estate
  • Cobblestone carriage drive

The Interior

  • Eight bedroom suites across three floors
  • Six bathrooms, all with period-appropriate luxury fittings
  • Grand reception hall with marble floors
  • Three formal reception rooms with original fireplaces
  • Library, billiard room, and private cinema
  • Wine cellar and separate caretaker quarters

Location

Dommeldange sits in the Alzette valley north of Luxembourg City, a secluded and exclusive area favoured by senior EU diplomats and the Grand Duchy’s most prominent families.

item.title: Historic City Townhouse
item.description:
One of the finest historic properties to come to market in Luxembourg City. This exceptional townhouse has been painstakingly restored by specialist craftsmen, preserving every original detail while integrating discreet modern comforts.

Features

  • Five floors including owner’s apartment, guest suite, and studio
  • Original stone staircase and parquet floors throughout
  • Period fireplaces in principal rooms — fully functioning
  • Formal reception rooms with ornate cornicing
  • Contemporary kitchen fitted sympathetically within historic shell
  • Private walled courtyard garden
  • Wine cellar spanning the full footprint of the building
  • Double garage via private lane to the rear

Location

Ville Haute is Luxembourg City’s historic heart — a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The property sits on one of the old town’s most distinguished streets, steps from the Grand Ducal Palace, the Chamber of Deputies, and the finest restaurants and boutiques in the capital.

item.title: Industrial Loft
item.description:
Converted from one of Clausen’s historic brewery buildings, this exceptional loft apartment offers space and character rarely found on the Luxembourg rental market.

Features

  • Double-height open-plan living space
  • Exposed original timber beams and brickwork
  • Three large skylights flooding the apartment with natural light
  • Mezzanine sleeping area with full-height wardrobe
  • Polished concrete floors throughout
  • Fully fitted designer kitchen
  • Private outdoor courtyard
  • Secure underground parking

Location

Clausen is a vibrant, bohemian neighbourhood tucked into the valley below the old city. Home to the Mousel brewery complex, craft bars, and the Philharmonie, it is one of Luxembourg’s most characterful addresses.

item.title: Large Family Home
item.description:
A truly impressive family home offering generous living space across three floors, with a large private garden and double garage. Built to a high standard with quality materials throughout.

Features

  • Five double bedrooms, master with en-suite
  • Three bathrooms plus separate WC on each floor
  • Spacious open-plan kitchen and family room
  • Formal lounge and separate dining room
  • Double garage with internal access
  • Private garden — 800m² plot
  • Full basement with laundry and storage rooms
  • Solar panels — low energy costs

Location

Hesperange borders Luxembourg City to the south and offers a peaceful residential setting with easy access to the capital. Excellent schools, parks, and motorway links within minutes.

item.title: Luxury Residence — Interior
item.description:
An extraordinary rental opportunity in Luxembourg’s most prestigious residential address. This fully furnished luxury villa combines architectural grandeur with meticulous interior design.

Interior Highlights

  • Grand entrance hall with marble staircase
  • Vast open-plan living and dining area, 80m²
  • Gourmet kitchen with Miele appliances and breakfast bar
  • Five bedrooms, all en-suite
  • Cinema room and private study
  • Wine cellar with temperature control
  • Designer furniture and artwork included

Location

Limpertsberg is Luxembourg City’s most exclusive neighbourhood, home to ambassadors, executives, and senior EU officials. Walking distance to the finest restaurants, private schools, and the city’s parks.

item.title: Luxury Villa
item.description:
An exceptional luxury villa situated in the highly sought-after Kirchberg neighbourhood, one of Luxembourg’s most prestigious residential areas.

Features

  • 5 spacious bedrooms with built-in wardrobes
  • 3 fully equipped bathrooms + guest WC
  • Private heated swimming pool
  • Professional-grade kitchen
  • Home cinema and wine cellar
  • Double garage with EV charging points
  • Smart home automation system

Location

Kirchberg is Luxembourg’s European Quarter, home to EU institutions and some of the finest restaurants and galleries in the country.

item.title: Luxury Villa — Exterior
item.description:
A flagship luxury rental — a contemporary white villa set behind private gates in the heart of Belair. The property offers exceptional outdoor entertaining space and a private swimming pool.

Exterior & Grounds

  • Private heated swimming pool and sun terrace
  • Professionally landscaped garden — 1,200m² plot
  • Covered outdoor dining loggia
  • Electric gate and video surveillance
  • Double garage with EV charging points
  • Garden lighting and irrigation system

Interior

  • Six bedrooms, master suite with dressing room and spa bathroom
  • Floor-to-ceiling glazing throughout
  • Bulthaup kitchen, fully equipped
  • Home automation system controlling lighting, heating, and security

Location

Belair is consistently ranked among Luxembourg’s top addresses, offering proximity to the best international schools, the Bambësch forest, and the city’s cultural institutions.

item.title: Modern Apartment
item.description:
This modern apartment sits in the heart of Luxembourg City, offering easy access to shops, restaurants, and public transport.

Features

  • Open-plan living and dining area
  • Modern fitted kitchen with island
  • Private balcony with city views
  • Underground parking space included
  • High-speed fibre internet ready
  • Double-glazed windows throughout

Location

Centrally located with walking distance to the main train station, Place d’Armes, and major business districts.

item.title: Modern Bungalow
item.description:
A rare single-storey property with all the space of a full family home. Built in 2020 to an award-winning contemporary design, the bungalow is fully accessible and immaculately presented.

Features

  • Four double bedrooms all on one level
  • Master bedroom with spa bathroom and garden access
  • Architect-designed open-plan kitchen, dining, and living room
  • Floor-to-ceiling glazing along the rear elevation
  • Large private garden — 600m² plot
  • Integrated home automation
  • Solar panels and heat pump — A energy class
  • Garage for two cars

Location

Mamer is a popular family commune 10km west of Luxembourg City, with excellent primary and secondary schools, a good range of shops, and fast motorway connections. The P+R at Bouillon provides quick access to the city by train.

item.title: Private Furnished Room
item.description:
A well-kept private room in a modern shared apartment, furnished to a practical standard with everything you need to move straight in. Shared with two quiet working professionals.

Room Contents

  • Single bed with mattress and bedding
  • Wardrobe with drawers
  • Study desk and chair — good for remote working
  • Window with blackout curtain
  • Bedside table and lamp

Shared Spaces

  • Modern kitchen fully equipped
  • Bright living room with sofa and TV
  • Bathroom shared with one other person
  • Washing machine access

All Bills Included

Rent covers electricity, heating, water, and internet. No hidden extras.

item.title: Riverside Apartment
item.description:
A stunning riverside apartment in the heart of Grund, one of Luxembourg’s most unique and picturesque neighbourhoods. Floor-to-ceiling glazing ensures the Alzette river and wooded valley cliffs are always in view.

Features

  • Panoramic river and cliff views from living room and bedroom
  • Floor-to-ceiling windows across the full river-facing elevation
  • Modern open-plan kitchen with breakfast bar
  • Two bedrooms, master with direct river view
  • Bathroom with walk-in shower and heated towel rail
  • Private terrace directly above the river
  • Secure building with intercom
  • Bicycle storage and basement cellar

Location

Grund sits at the base of Luxembourg’s dramatic cliff formations, carved by the Alzette river. A bohemian quarter known for its nightlife, restaurants, and direct lift access up to the old town above.

item.title: Riverside Penthouse
item.description:
A rare opportunity to acquire this breathtaking penthouse with panoramic views over the Alzette valley and the iconic old town of Luxembourg.

Features

  • Floor-to-ceiling glazing on all sides
  • Wrap-around terrace of 60m²
  • Bespoke Italian kitchen with breakfast bar
  • Master suite with dressing room and spa bathroom
  • Concierge service
  • Two secure underground parking bays
  • Private storage cellar

Location

Clausen is a vibrant district nestled in the valley below Luxembourg’s old city, known for its restaurants, breweries, and easy access to the Pfaffenthal lift connecting to the city centre.

item.title: Room in Grand Residence
item.description:
An unparalleled room rental — a private bedroom in one of Luxembourg’s most impressive private residences. Your rent gives you access to a breathtaking 120m² formal salon with coffered ceilings, a crystal chandelier, Italian marble feature walls, and bespoke velvet and gold furniture.

Your Private Room

  • Large private bedroom with en-suite bathroom
  • Built-in wardrobe and dressing area
  • Quiet garden-facing aspect
  • Lockable door for full privacy

Shared Grand Spaces

  • 120m² formal living room — chandelier, marble, designer sofas
  • Fully equipped gourmet kitchen
  • Separate formal dining room
  • Private garden and terrace

All Inclusive

Electricity, heating, water, and high-speed Wi-Fi all included in the monthly rent. Shared with just one other tenant.

item.title: Single Room in Luxury Flat
item.description:
A rare opportunity to rent a private room in one of Limpertsberg’s most elegantly furnished apartments. The shared living room — with its marble floors, ceiling fans, designer sofas, and premium lighting — is a genuinely luxurious communal space shared with just one other professional tenant.

Your Private Room

  • Spacious private bedroom with lockable door
  • Built-in wardrobe and study area
  • Window with garden view
  • Use of all shared spaces

Shared Spaces

  • Grand marble-floored living room with ceiling fans and chandelier
  • Fully equipped gourmet kitchen
  • Shared bathroom (one other tenant)
  • Private balcony access

Bills Included

All utilities — electricity, heating, water, and Wi-Fi — are included in the monthly rent. No additional costs.

item.title: Sky Penthouse
item.description:
Perched atop Luxembourg’s most iconic residential tower, this extraordinary penthouse is unlike anything else on the market. The 200m² wraparound terrace with an outdoor lounge, dining area, and plunge pool delivers a lifestyle without compromise.

Features

  • 380m² interior across an open-plan single floor
  • 200m² wraparound terrace — 360° city panorama
  • Outdoor lounge and dining area with retractable awning
  • Private plunge pool on the terrace
  • Four bedroom suites, each with en-suite bathroom and dressing room
  • Bulthaup kitchen with full Gaggenau appliance suite
  • Private cinema room and home office
  • Four underground parking spaces + private EV charging
  • 24/7 concierge, security, and building management

Location

Located in the thriving Ban de Gasperich district — Luxembourg’s newest premium quarter — with direct tram access to Kirchberg and the city centre, surrounded by the finest retail, dining, and leisure in the Grand Duchy.

item.title: Solo Studio
item.description:
A cleverly planned studio apartment built with the solo dweller in mind. Every centimetre has been thought through — you get a comfortable bed area, a dedicated work desk, a kitchenette, and a private shower room, all without paying for space you don’t need.

Features

  • Single bed with storage underneath
  • Compact but fully fitted kitchenette — hob, microwave, fridge
  • Shower room with underfloor heating
  • Work desk with built-in shelving
  • Large window with blackout blind
  • High-speed internet included in rent
  • Secure building with video entry system

Ideal For

A single professional, student, or anyone relocating to Luxembourg who wants a private, affordable base without sharing walls with flatmates.

item.title: Split-Level Duplex
item.description:
A show-stopping split-level apartment that feels more like a house. The double-height living room and statement spiral staircase create a dramatic, gallery-like space perfect for those who want something truly different.

Features

  • Double-height open-plan living and dining room
  • Statement spiral staircase linking both levels
  • Three bedrooms — two on upper level, one on lower
  • Two bathrooms with designer fittings
  • Kitchen with marble island and integrated Siemens appliances
  • Private balcony on each level
  • Underground parking and storage cellar included
  • Video intercom and secure entrance

Location

Cents is a quiet, green residential commune bordering the Alzette valley. Close to the Kirchberg plateau, the Cactus supermarket, and with good tram access to the city centre.
